title: Staff Break Room Adhesive Door Sign – Silver, 1 mm Aluminium, 120×100 mm, Peel & Stick, Universal Icon, Waterproof Wipe-Clean Metal Plate for Offices/Shops/Schools
features: PREMIUM METAL PLATE: 1 mm solid aluminium with a brushed-silver face and high-contrast black text/icon—smart, durable and professional.
PEEL & STICK INSTALL: High-strength self-adhesive backing pre-applied; just peel, position and press on smooth, non-porous surfaces.
INDOOR/OUTDOOR SUITABILITY: Waterproof, wipe-clean and rust-resistant—ideal for entrances, corridors and doors in workplaces and public buildings.
COMPACT & TOUGH: Low-profile 120×100 mm metal plate resists knocks and routine cleaning—won’t tear like vinyl stickers.
CLEAR WAYFINDING: “Staff Break Room” with universal icon improves navigation for staff and visitors.
description: Professional signage with zero drilling. This brushed silver Staff Break Room sign is a slim, 1 mm solid aluminium plate with crisp black text and a universal icon. It installs in seconds using the pre-applied high-strength self-adhesive backing for a clean, permanent-style finish. Material: 1 mm solid aluminium, brushed silver with black text/icon Size: 120 mm × 100 mm (approx. 4.7" × 3.9") Mounting: Peel-and-stick self-adhesive (no screws or drilling) Use: Waterproof, wipe-clean, rust-resistant; suitable for workplaces and public areas Ideal for: Hospitals, offices, shops, schools, factories, hotels, restaurants, supermarkets Installation tips: Apply to clean, dry, smooth surfaces at room temperature. Press firmly for 30–60 seconds; full bond develops after ~24 hours. Avoid dusty/flaky paint and highly textured or porous substrates. In the box: 1 × silver aluminium adhesive sign (Staff Break Room).
